    "Oxygen level is 19.0%, which is below the OSHA minimum safe entry level of 19.5%",
    "Atmosphere is oxygen-deficient and hazardous for entry without appropriate controls or ventilation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Do not enter the confined space",
    "Evacuate the area if already inside",
    "Initiate forced-air ventilation and re-test the atmosphere before entry"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.146 defines an oxygen-deficient atmosphere as any atmosphere containing less than 19.5% oxygen by volume. A reading of 19.0% is unsafe for entry without supplied-air respirators or continuous ventilation that restores the oxygen level to a safe range.",

    "OSHA 1910.146(b) - Definition of 'Hazardous atmosphere'",
    "OSHA 1910.146(c)(5)(ii)(C)"
  ]
